cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking for the writer's opinion of the story, so I need to figure out which of the given options best represents the main message or moral of the story. The story is about a guy who has cancer and doesn't know how long he has left. He becomes friends with a girl at a music store and buys a CD every day, but he's too shy to ask her out. He leaves his phone number once, but before she can respond, he dies. The mother finds out all the CDs had notes from
